process: 1. Flash borrow $10 worth of ARB from Aave
2. Swap ARB → DAI via ParaSwap integration
3. Repay $10 DAI debt with swapped DAI
4. Keep $10 ARB debt from flash loan
5. Net result: $10 less DAI debt, $10 more ARB debt
1. Flash borrow $10 worth of DAI from Aave
2. Swap DAI → ARB via ParaSwap integration
3. Repay $10 ARB debt with swapped ARB
4. Keep $10 DAI debt from flash loan
5. Net result: $10 less ARB debt, $10 more DAI debt

strategy_benefits.debt_composition_flexibility: Can adjust debt exposure without affecting collateral
strategy_benefits.contrarian_trading: Profit from asset price recovery while maintaining leverage
strategy_benefits.gas_efficiency: Single transaction per debt swap operation

implementation_requirements.flash_loan_capability: Built into Aave debt swap mechanism
implementation_requirements.paraswap_routing: Automatic DEX routing for optimal swap execution

current_system.method: Borrow DAI → Swap DAI to ARB → Hold ARB
current_system.collateral_impact: Must add ARB as collateral or hold externally
current_system.debt_management: DAI debt remains, ARB exposure via token holding
current_system.complexity: Requires collateral management and token custody

debt_swap_system.method: Swap DAI debt → ARB debt directly
debt_swap_system.complexity: Single transaction, no additional custody needed
